task.summary: Apply the 8-round ResearchOps platform design critique as repository documentation with full traceability.
task.constraint: No action is to be taken on the priorities raised.

reviewCorrection.issue: Trace did not record the full AGENTS.md operating-model bootstrap, skipped bundles or precedence decisions.
reviewCorrection.correction: Recorded all mandatory bootstrap files, ZIP inspection boundary, selected bundles, skipped bundles and precedence decisions.

bundleZipInspection.inspectionBoundary: The connector exposes the ZIP as a binary repository object. The trace records path and blob presence, but does not claim internal ZIP entry review.

selectedBundles.reason: Government product assurance and prioritisation framing.
User explicitly requested the GOV.UK critique lens.

skippedBundles.reason: No Worker, Pages, Wrangler, route, binding or deployment change.
No Airtable table, record, formula, linked record or attachment change.
No Mural OAuth, workspace, room, board, widget or sticky note change.

precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond governed branch hygiene, no force update, PR discipline and scope control.
ResearchOps Developer governed repository context and documentation placement.
Gold Standard Gov Product Assistant governed public-sector product critique framing and P1 to P3 prioritisation.
GOV.UK Design System governed GOV.UK service quality, interaction pattern and accessibility critique framing.
API-specific bundles were not activated because no API implementation domain was in scope.

correctiveBranchBehaviour.reason: The branch was created from the PR #209 merge commit, then compare showed it was two commits behind main before file changes.

nonActionBoundary: No code, UI, tests or configuration changed.
validationDesigned: review selected and skipped bundle records
residualRisks: The critique is not a usability test finding.
The P1 to P3 list is a critique output, not an approved implementation roadmap.
The critique should not be actioned until separately reviewed and approved.
The bundle ZIP was verified as a repository object but not unpacked through this trace flow.
